summary: Iteration 74 - Oracle Autonomous Engine Testing Complete. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All Oracle Engine features verified. NEW features tested: Engine status with pipeline stats and 11 scheduler jobs, Font-Audit button, Knowledge-Sync button, Task creation with valid types. Supabase connected (green), DeepSeek connected (green). Engine tab shows live pipeline stats: 149 pending, 3 running, 2,628 total tasks.

minor.issue: Timeout (502) during test - endpoint takes 60+ seconds due to DeepSeek processing. This is EXPECTED behavior per test request notes.
minor.note: Not a bug - the endpoint processes 5 tasks sequentially with DeepSeek calls (7-15s each)

minor.issue: brain_notes_note_type_check constraint violation when syncing - note_type 'operational' may need to be added to allowed types in Supabase
minor.log: new row for relation 'brain_notes' violates check constraint 'brain_notes_note_type_check'

action_items: Consider adding 'operational' to brain_notes_note_type_check constraint in Supabase if Knowledge-Sync should store operational notes
critical_code_review_comments: Oracle Engine is processing tasks autonomously - logs show tasks being REASSIGNED after verification failures (expected behavior)
11 scheduler jobs registered correctly including 4 Oracle-specific jobs
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ prefixed tasks via API: TEST_Task_General, TEST_Task_Improvement, TEST_Task_Monitoring
context_for_next_testing_agent: Oracle Autonomous Engine fully operational. 11 scheduler jobs running (4 Oracle + 7 existing). Engine processes pending tasks every 90 seconds via DeepSeek. Font-Audit scans CSS files. Knowledge-Sync aggregates data from Brain/Knowledge/Memory/MongoDB. Task creation working with valid types. Supabase and DeepSeek both connected (green pills).

admin_login_flow.flow: Email -> Weiter -> Role Selection (Administration) -> Password -> Anmelden -> Dashboard

oracle_overview_tab.stat_cards: 6 stat cards with live data from Supabase

api_test_results.GET /api/admin/oracle/engine/status: PASS - returns pipeline stats and scheduler.jobs array with 11 jobs
api_test_results.POST /api/admin/oracle/engine/font-audit: PASS - returns audit with files_scanned, unique_fonts, issues
api_test_results.POST /api/admin/oracle/engine/trigger: TIMEOUT (502) - Expected due to 60+ second processing time
api_test_results.GET /api/admin/oracle/dashboard: PASS - returns counts with brain_notes, knowledge_entries, etc

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are LIVE: Supabase PostgreSQL, DeepSeek LLM, Arcee AI (Master), mem0 Brain
